_comment: Illustrative LLM output. Actual phrasing will vary.

update.subject: Product Update: Week of July 7 — Strong WAU, SSO on track, one at-risk item
update.tl_dr: WAU grew 8% to 4,820. CSV export shipped for enterprise. SSO on track for July 28. Recurring tasks at risk — decision needed by July 16 to avoid slip.
update.body_markdown:
## Product Update — week of July 7–14

**TL;DR:** WAU +8% | SSO on track | Recurring tasks at risk | Decision needed on headcount

---

### ✅ Shipped this week

- **Bulk CSV export** — Enterprise customers can now export any project view to CSV for external reporting (ENG-451)
- **Search 5× faster** — P95 search latency down from 4s to 0.8s (ENG-471)
- **Fixed: duplicate email notifications** — Resolved for all users (ENG-461)

---

### 🔄 In progress

| Feature | ETA | Status |
|---|---|---|
| SSO (SAML 2.0) | July 28 | ✅ On track |
| Recurring tasks | Aug 4 | ⚠️ At risk |

**Recurring tasks at risk:** One open question (task deletion behavior) must be resolved by July 16 to stay on track. Decision scheduled for this Wednesday.

---

### 📅 Up next

- Role-based access control (RBAC)
- Microsoft Teams integration

---

### 📊 Metrics

| Metric | This week | Change |
|---|---|---|
| WAU | 4,820 | +8% |
| NPS | 42 | — |
| Support tickets | 38 | -12% |

---

### 🚦 Risks

- **Recurring tasks slip** — if deletion behavior decision does not happen by July 16, August 4 delivery is in jeopardy

---

### 🎯 Decision needed

- **Q3 engineering headcount** — approval needed for 2 additional engineers by **July 21**
